subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! In this day, firmness and constancy are the standard whereby the Supreme Concourse and the Abhá Kingdom do measure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق الیوم ثبوت و رسوخ میزان ملا اعلی و ملکوت ابهی و اما من ثقلت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
